summary: Tested Dynamic Redeem Limit System based on Growth Network size. All 17 backend tests passed. The new system correctly calculates unlock% from network size (Level thresholds: 10→10%, 20→20%, 40→30%, etc.), applies admin max cap (70% default), and computes redeemable/available PRC using the formula: Redeemable = Total Earned × Unlock%, Available = max(0, Redeemable - Total Redeemed), capped at current balance.
critical_code_review_comments: calculate_user_redeem_limit() in server.py line ~15666 correctly implements the formula
get_user_unlock_percent() in growth_economy.py correctly calculates unlock from network level with admin cap
get_network_size() uses BFS to traverse referral tree up to max depth
API endpoint /api/user/{uid}/redeem-limit returns all required fields including effective_available

success_rate.frontend: N/A - backend only testing as requested

test_user_with_referrals.note: User has already redeemed more than current limit allows (251% usage)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Dynamic Redeem Limit System fully verified. Formula: Unlock% = min(Level × 10, AdminMaxCap), Redeemable = TotalEarned × Unlock%, Available = max(0, Redeemable - TotalRedeemed), EffectiveAvailable = min(Available, CurrentBalance). Level thresholds: [10, 20, 40, 80, 160, 320, 640, 800, 1000]. Admin default max cap is 70%. burn-test-1 has 0 network = 0% unlock. santosh has 50 network = Level 3 = 30% unlock but has already exceeded limit (83099 redeemed vs 33052 redeemable).

features_tested.GET /api/user/{uid}/redeem-limit: PASS - Returns unlock_percent, network_size, growth_level, total_earned, redeemable, total_redeemed, available, effective_available
features_tested.User with 50 network: PASS - Has Level 3 = 30% unlock (capped by admin 70% default)
features_tested.Unlimited flag: PASS - Always false in new dynamic system
